summary: Iteration 9 testing completed successfully. All Media Library features verified working: modal opens from Library button, displays 6 seeded images, search filters by filename, image selection updates featured image, Cancel/Close buttons dismiss modal. Date+time format in Articles List verified (e.g., 'Apr 1, 2026 — 16:33'). Ctrl+K inline link input in TipTap editor verified: opens link bar, Apply button sets link, Escape key dismisses bar.
passed_tests: GET /api/media returns list of media items with pagination (6 items)
GET /api/media?q=bitcoin filters images by filename (1 result)
Media Library modal opens when clicking 'Library' button in ArticleEditor
Media Library displays 6 existing images from /api/media endpoint
Media Library search filters images by filename (bitcoin search returns 1 item)
Selecting an image shows '1 image selected' text and enables 'Use Selected Image' button
Clicking 'Use Selected Image' sets featured image URL and closes modal
Media Library Cancel button dismisses modal
Media Library Close (X) button dismisses modal
Admin articles list shows date + time format (e.g., 'Apr 1, 2026 — 16:33')
Ctrl+K opens inline link input bar in TipTap editor
Link input bar has URL input field and Apply button
Link input bar Apply button closes the bar after setting link
Escape key dismisses link input bar
critical_code_review_comments: MediaLibrary.js: Well-structured component with proper state management, search debouncing via useEffect, and clean UI
ArticleEditor.js: Properly integrates MediaLibrary with onSelect callback to update featured_image field
ArticlesList.js: formatDate function correctly formats timestamps with date + time (line 9-15)
TipTapEditor.js: Ctrl+K handler properly implemented with useEffect for keyboard shortcut (lines 109-118)
Backend /api/media endpoint properly excludes _id from response (line 708: projection {'_id': 0})
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 seeded media items and 10 seeded articles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified all new Media Library features: (1) Library button in ArticleEditor opens MediaLibrary modal, (2) Modal displays images from /api/media endpoint with search/filter capability, (3) Image selection updates featured_image field, (4) Cancel/Close buttons work correctly. Also verified: (5) Articles list shows date+time format, (6) Ctrl+K opens inline link input in TipTap editor with Apply button and Escape key dismissal. All backend APIs tested via pytest. Cloudinary sync endpoint may fail without credentials in preview env - this is expected.
